mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, file_id, material_category, status, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.file_id, f.original_name, f.file_size, f.mime_type, f.extension, f.storage_type, 'report_material' AS business_type, m.material_category AS business_id, f.is_private, f.access_url, f.upload_time, f.download_count FROM ai_report_material m INNER JOIN sys_file_metadata f ON f.file_id = m.file_id AND f.status = 1 WHERE m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND m.file_id = #{fileId} AND m.status = 1 LIMIT 1
